provider: PolyU BRE JS3789 Surveying Scheme Book 2025/26
note: The official 2026 entry page requires 120 academic credits plus 2 training credits and says students choose one of five surveying disciplines in Year 3. The latest publicly linked Scheme Book is for the 2025/26 cohort; its coded progression pattern and discipline tables are used as the course source, while the 2026 page independently confirms the same five current discipline identities. Building Surveying, General Practice Surveying, Planning and Development, Property and Facility Management, and Quantity Surveying are therefore modelled as separate Major/Track identities. Each track contains the 24 unique coded shared progression subjects and its 11 published discipline-specific subjects. Recommended Year and Semester follow the Scheme Book's explicit Stage 1-4 progression; BRE299 and BRE365 remain unassigned to one Year because the official pattern spans alternative or multiple stages. Uncoded LCR, CAR, GUR and Free Elective slots are omitted, and this coded planning subset does not assert graduation completion.
